name: Nieman-Marcus $250.00 Cookie Recipe
recipeInstructions:
Blended Oatmeal: Measure and blend in blender until it becomes a fine powder.
1. Cream butter and sugars together.
2. Add eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Mix in flour, blended oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Fold in chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and chopped nuts.
5. Chill the dough.
6. Roll into balls and place 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 6 minutes.
